The CMF Phone 2 Pro launched in April last year, so naturally, one should expect to hear about its successor by now. While rumours of such a device emerged a few months back, there was no official word on its existence. Now, Nothing co-founder Akis Evangelidis has revealed that there will be no CMF Phone […]

items.title: Sources: PC makers, including HP, are in talks with their supply-chain partners about using CXMT's memory chips in products bound for Asia as DRAM prices soar (Wall Street Journal)
items.summary:
Wall Street Journal:
Sources: PC makers, including HP, are in talks with their supply-chain partners about using CXMT's memory chips in products bound for Asia as DRAM prices soar  —  Prices soar because capacity isn't growing quickly, while China option is limited by national-security concerns

items.title: Amazon Device early Prime Day deals live from $16: Echo, Kindle, Ring, Ember Artline TV, more [Updated]
items.summary:
Update 6/18: This post has been updated with new Amazon Ember Artline frame TV at $200 off as well as today’s all-time lows on the latest Ring releases, Blink smart home gear, and some Kindle offers.

The Amazon Device early Prime Day deals are starting up in a major way today. We had already tracked a few notable discounts last week, but the actual early Prime Day offers on the Echo gear are going live today with new all-time low pricing now available on the Amazon Echo Dot Max and Echo Studio at up to 35% off, as well as latest Amazon Echo Show 8 and Show 11 smart displays, eeor network gear, and more from $16. We are also now tracking all-time lows on the new Amazon Ember Artline frame TV at $200 off.

items.title: Aura’s impressive e-ink photo frame doesn’t even look digital
items.summary: All of Aura's frames connect to the Aura app, which is where you can upload photos from your phone, web, email, iCloud, or Google Photos.

items.title: Score up to $893 bundled savings + price cuts on Lectric e-bikes during its Father’s Day Sale starting from $799
items.summary: Lectric has launched its Father’s Day e-bike Sale with up to $893 savings and 15% off accessories, with the main focus being on the Xpedition2 Cargo e-bikes that are getting the biggest savings. During this event, you can find the Xpedition2 Single-Battery e-bike with a $346 FREE bundle at $1,399 shipped, while the Xpedition2 Dual-Battery e-bike comes with a $744 FREE bundle at $1,799 shipped, and the Xpedition2 Long-Range Dual-Battery e-bike gets a $893 FREE bundle at $1,999 shipped. Normally these bundles would run for $1,745, $2,543, and $2,892 without the usual savings on the bundles, which are coming in as the biggest collective savings yet in 2026. These bundles are primarily focused on comfortable passenger-forward accessories, especially for parents who are in need of a new way to shepherd their kids around safely. Head below to check out the full lineup of offers across the brand’s entire fleet.

items.title: EcoFlow’s Early Prime Day Sale offers up to 62% power station discounts, bonus extra savings, free gifts, rewards, more from $149
items.summary: EcoFlow has officially begun its Prime Day Sale event with early deals of up to 62% off power stations with a bunch of extra savings opportunities, including 2x + 3x EcoCredit rewards (more on these below). One notable return during this sale gives you the tried-and-true DELTA Pro 3,600Wh Portable Power Station with 2x 220W solar panels at $2,041.55 shipped, after using the bonus savings code 26EFPDAFF at checkout. This package goes for $5,199 at full price, which we saw discounted furthest to $2,279 in 2025, and $2,149 in 2026, which was seen in last month’s EcoCredits Madness Sale for only a handful of days. Now, you’re getting a brand new all-time low price for this bundle with $3,057 savings. You can also find the station on its own for $1,614 shipped, using the above code, beating Amazon by $85, too. Head below to get the full rundown on extra savings during this sale, as well as to browse the full lineup of deals.

items.title: Enjoy various textures via Ninja’s Belgian Waffle Maker Pro while it is down at a $70 2026 low ahead of Prime Day
items.summary: Amazon is currently offering the Ninja Belgian Waffle Maker Pro down at $69.99 shipped, which matches the price we’re seeing direct from the brand’s website. Normally $100 at full price, we’ve seen three previous discounts on this appliance in 2026, the first two cutting the price down to $80, while the third took things lower to today’s same rate. While it has dipped a little lower in the past, you’re still getting a solid $30 markdown off the going rate for the best price we have tracked in 2026. You’ll find a large collection of other Ninja deals over in the official Amazon storefront here.

items.title: Summer 2026 deal schedule: The biggest sales of the year go live next week [Updated]
items.summary: June 2026 will feature the biggest sale events on the internet so far this year. While we historically have to wait until early/mid-July for the massive half year sale events, Amazon has pushed the schedule early this year and it appears as though just about all of the major retailers are following suit.

items.title: Ahead of Prime Day, Amazon has dropped the Bissell Little-Green Mini cordless deep cleaner to a new $110 low
items.summary: Ahead of Prime Day, Amazon is giving the best price yet on the Bissell Little Green Mini Cordless Portable Carpet and Upholstery Deep Cleaner for $109.99 shipped. Originally $160 at full price, but only climbing as high as $130 since late January, we previously only saw it go as low as $115 back in August 2025, with 2026 seeing it between $130 and $117. Now, you’re able to pick it up with a $20 markdown off the newer going rate ($50 off the original MSRP) for a new all-time low price. If you don’t mind a corded model, you can find the standard Little-Green deep cleaner down at $95 right now, while the corded Little-Green Mini is down at $80.
